description:
Offered: every semester
Teacher candidates complete a practicum in an educational setting under the direction of a supervising practitioner who is certified in the area of licensure sought by the candidate and under the guidance of the university supervisor.
Prerequisite(s): Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review.
Note: Required of Elementary Education Majors.
Corequisite(s): EDUC 4550
prerequisites: Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review.
